name: Mistral Codestral
pricing_notes: Codestral: $0.3/M input tokens, $0.9/M output; FIM endpoint free for IDE plugins; Codestral Mamba variant available

auth.notes: Mistral API key (separate key for Codestral FIM endpoint used by IDE plugins)

performance.notes: FIM (fill-in-middle) completions ~200ms; TTFT competitive with GPT-4o-mini; Mamba variant faster

agent_readiness.notes: Mistral's specialized code generation model. 32K context window. Fill-in-Middle (FIM) support for code completion in IDE context. Supports 80+ programming languages. Best-in-class on code benchmarks for its price tier. Used in VS Code Continue.dev and other IDE plugins. OpenAI-compatible API. Python/JS SDK.

gotchas: Separate API key required for FIM endpoint (ide plugin key vs standard API key)
Not as strong as Claude 3.5 Sonnet or GPT-4o on complex algorithmic problems
Codestral Mamba variant faster but lower quality than base Codestral
No function calling / tool use support in Codestral (use Mistral Large for that)
best_when: Code completion in IDE plugins (Continue.dev, vim plugins) needing fast FIM
High-volume code generation where cost efficiency matters vs frontier models
Agents generating boilerplate code or completing partial implementations
Multilingual code generation across 80+ programming languages
avoid_when: Complex reasoning or algorithmic problem solving (use Claude or GPT-4o)
Tool-calling agentic workflows (Codestral lacks function calling)
Tasks requiring general knowledge alongside code (use Mistral Large)
summary: Mistral Codestral is a specialized code generation model with 32K context and Fill-in-Middle (FIM) support for IDE completion. Supports 80+ programming languages. Competitive on code benchmarks at low cost ($0.3/M input tokens). OpenAI-compatible API with Python/JS SDKs. No tool calling — purely for code generation. Best for cost-efficient high-volume code completion in IDE plugins and agentic pipelines.
